channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Retiring England greats out cheaply as hosts set for heavy defeat at Lord's
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England are hurtling towards a seemingly inevitable defeat to India in the historic Women's Test at Lord's after closing on 130-6 in a record chase of 457, with Heather Knight and Tammy Beaumont out cheaply in their final knocks before international retirement.

item.title: Noppert receives social media abuse following loss on European Tour
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Danny Noppert opened up on the social media abuse he received following his loss at the European Darts Open.

item.title: ASUSS Hails FG, Makinde Over Rescue Of Abducted Oyo Pupils, Teachers
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Academic Staff Union of Secondary Schools (ASUSS) has praised the Federal Government and Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, for the successful rescue of pupils and teachers who were abducted in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State about two months ago. The union described the development as

item.description: "Corruption has always been with us. Now that this particular case has been exposed, those involved..." The post PFIPC scandal reflects deeper rot in Nigeria — Anglican Archbishop appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: As part of efforts to reduce trafficking among children to the barest minimum in Nigeria, the Nigerians in Diaspora Organisation (NIDO) Africa, has extended their sensitization campaign to Makurdi, the Benue State capital. item.title: FIFA To Consider Expanding 2030 World Cup To 64 Teams
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: FIFA president Gianni Infantino has confirmed that world football’s governing body will examine a proposal to expand the FIFA World Cup to 64 teams for the 2030 edition following the conclusion of the ongoing 2026 tournament. The current World Cup, jointly hosted by the United States, Canada and Mex

item.title: EFCC Appeals N10m Defamation Judgment In Agunloye Case
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has appealed the judgment of the Federal Capital Territory High Court, Abuja, which awarded N10 million in damages to former Minister of Power, Olu Agunloye, over a defamatory social media publication linked to the alleged $6 billion Mambilla Power

item.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Donald Trump pays tribute to the 71-year-old South Carolina senator, calling him a "true American patriot" who will be "greatly missed".

item.description: The Ogun State Police Command on Sunday disclosed the arrest of 43 suspects after a coordinated raid on criminal hideouts as part of the ongoing “Operation Kosaye.” The joint operation was launched last month by the Ogun and Lagos commands in a bid to rid the two states of banditry, kidn

item.description: Super Eagles goalkeeper Stanley Nwabali has completed a return to South African side Chippa United, five months after parting ways with the club. item.title: African-owned Telecel challenges European rivals for UK network
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay Tech
item.description: Telecel Group, the pan-African telecommunications company co-founded by Lebanese-Ghanaian businessman Moh Damush, is making a bold push into Europe, challenging read more African-owned Telecel challenges European rivals for UK network

item.title: Rita Dominic Celebrates Birthday With Heartfelt Thanksgiving
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress Rita Dominic is celebrating another year of life with gratitude and elegance. The award-winning actress took to Instagram to share a glamorous video of herself, accompanied by a heartfelt message thanking God for His continued blessings. “Another year. Another birthda

item.title: Troops Intercept Truck Conveying Illicit Drugs Along Lagos–Calabar Coastal Road
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Linus Aleke in Abuja Troops of the 65 Battalion, Nigerian Army, have intercepted a truck conveying a large consignment of illicit drugs along the Lagos–Calabar Coastal Road following actionable intelligence

item.title: Oyedepo Urges Worshippers to Secure PVCs Ahead of 2027 Polls
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: The founder of the Living Faith Church (LFC), Bishop David Oyedepo, on Sunday urged worshippers to secure their Permanent Voter Cards (PVCs) ahead of the country’s 2027 general election. He

item.title: Kano Pilgrims Board Fixes 2027 Hajj Deposit At N8.5m
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Kano State Pilgrims Welfare Board has announced an initial deposit of N8.5 million for intending pilgrims seeking to perform the 2027 Hajj. The Director-General of the Board, Alhaji Abubakar Ibrahim Matawalle, disclosed this during a press conference held at the board’s headquarters in Kan

item.title: ‘Sheikh Hamad will be fondly remembered across the Gulf’
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: ‘Sheikh Hamad will be fondly remembered across the Gulf’

item.title: Benue: Protesters Storm Och’Idoma’s Palace With Corpses After Weekend Herdsmen Attack
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Enraged protesters on Sunday stormed the palace of the paramount ruler of the Idoma nation, the Och’Idoma, His Royal Majesty Agabaidu Elaigwu John Odogbo, carrying the corpses of victims killed in fresh attacks by suspected herdsmen. At least 16 persons were confirmed dead following separate attacks

item.title: Actress Doris Ogala Allgedly Offered Programmer Her Nood Video So He Can Stop Exposing Her On His Page.
item.dc:creator: SDK Celeb
item.description: The Israeli trained programmer Kansi alleges on his page that Doris is part of a blackmailing ring and partly runs the cutie blog.........The attached screenshot is her convo with Mr Kansi.....Everyone has learnt from Doris how to keep records of convos and chats....This is just me doing my job and

item.title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: He took power in 1996 after staging a bloodless coup against his father, and went on to transform Qatar into the gas-rich power it is today.

item.title: Official: Chippa United announce Stanley Nwabali’s return 5 months after surprise exit
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: South African Premier Soccer League club, Chippa United, has announced the signing of Super Eagles goalkeeper Stanley Nwabali, Soccernet.ng reports. Recall that Nwabali left the Chilli Boys after the end of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations in February this year. Following that move, he was linked with
